mapper.select:
SELECT U.USER_ID AS userId, U.LOGIN_ID AS loginId, U.USER_NAME AS userName, U.DEPT_ID AS deptId, D.DEPT_NAME AS deptName, U.USER_ROLE AS userRole, U.USE_YN AS useYn, U.CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM TB_USER U LEFT JOIN TB_DEPARTMENT D ON U.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID WHERE 1=1
AND U.LOGIN_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{loginId}, '%')
AND U.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%')
AND D.DEPT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{deptName}, '%')
AND U.USER_ROLE = #{userRole}
AND U.USE_YN = #{useYn}
ORDER BY U.CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_USER SET PASSWORD = #{password} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
UPDATE TB_USER SET PASSWORD = #{password}, PASSWORD_RESET_YN = 'N' WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
UPDATE TB_USER SET PASSWORD_RESET_YN = #{passwordResetYn} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}

SELECT DEPT_ID as deptId, DEPT_NAME as deptName FROM TB_DEPARTMENT WHERE USE_YN = 'Y'
AND DEPT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{deptName}, '%')
